But only if you stop making these 17 mistakes:

Fix: Paste the text into a Google doc. Download as .md format. Under 200 tokens.

Some of you ran into Opus 4.7 refusing normal code edits with "this might be malware" warnings. That was a bug on our side, not the model being cautious.

Older builds applied a stale safety prompt that Opus 4.7 doesn't need. Run claude update or relaunch the app.
